expectations.evidence: No reference to guide.md or its structured item codes (SEO-01~11, WP-01~18). The review uses ad-hoc issue numbering (1-1, 1-2, etc.) and custom severity labels (Critical, Major, Minor) rather than the guide's structured format.
Issue 1-1 flags missing meta description. Issue 1-2 flags generic title tag. Issue 1-6 flags missing canonical URL. All three meta tag categories are covered.
Section 2-6 (Positive) notes: '헤딩 계층 구조(h1 -> h2)가 올바르게 설정됨' confirming heading hierarchy was checked.

expectations.text: References SEO item IDs (SEO-01~11) in findings
expectations.evidence: No SEO item codes (SEO-01, SEO-02, etc.) appear anywhere in the output. Issues are numbered with custom IDs like 1-1, 1-2, 2-1, etc.

expectations.text: Provides fix recommendations for identified issues
expectations.evidence: Each issue includes a '권장 조치' (recommended action) section with specific guidance, e.g. adding meta description with example HTML, changing title to include keywords, adding canonical tag.
